siteInfo.title: WhatIfWeBelieved — Global Faith & Theology
siteInfo.description: A global media ministry exploring faith, theology, and the transformative power of belief. Join millions worldwide in thought-provoking teaching and conversation.

hero.title:
What If We
Believed?
hero.description: A global media ministry exploring faith, theology, and the transformative power of belief through thought-provoking teaching and conversation.
hero.videoTitle: How a Good Man Loses His Shape
whispers: What would change if we truly believed?
Across every nation, one question remains…
Belief is not the absence of doubt — it is the courage beyond it.

articles.title: Hermeneutical Analysis of 2 Samuel 11
articles.description: A multi-lens study of David's moral self-destruction — integrating historical-critical, narrative, theological, and moral-psychological approaches to the delivery of Uriah's death.

articles.title: The Parable of the Lost Shape
articles.description: Exploring how a good man loses his shape, and what that teaches us about grace, restoration, and the image of God.

articles.title: No Guardrails: Faith Without a Safety Net
articles.description: What happens when God removes every safety net and calls you to trust Him with nothing but a promise?

videos.title: Reprogramming an Empire: From Erased Asset to Indispensable Anchor
How a Good Man Loses His Shape
No Guardrails: Faith Without a Safety Net
Not a Word: When God Goes Silent
Transactional Success: When Faith Becomes a Contract
Default Settings: Restoring What Was Lost

voices.quote: This channel changed how I see scripture. The depth of teaching is unlike anything I’ve found online.
voices.author: Chidi A.

voices.quote: I share every video with my small group in São Paulo. The questions raised here are universal.
voices.author: Maria L.

voices.quote: Finally, a theology channel that respects both the intellect and the heart. Brilliant work.
voices.author: James R.

voices.quote: The message crosses every cultural boundary. I watch with subtitles and it still moves me deeply.
voices.author: Yuki T.

voices.quote: Watching from Atlanta. The 'No Guardrails' teaching rewired my understanding of faith entirely.
voices.author: David M.

voices.quote: Theological depth meets cinematic quality. A rare combination that keeps me coming back every week.
voices.author: Hans K.

book.title: Affirming Faith Through Thought
book.description: A limited-release book exploring the intersection of reason and belief. Available in English, with translations planned for Spanish, Portuguese, and French.
book.releaseNote: Limited release · Free for a short time

cta.title: Join the Global Conversation
cta.description: Subscribe to WhatIfWeBelieved and explore faith, theology, and the questions that resonate across every culture and continent.
